stemHtml: Your aircraft is approved to conduct RNP APP. Can you fly RNP 2?

options.a: Yes, because the most restricted procedure contains the least requirements.
options.b: Yes, because your aircraft is approved for a more restricted procedure.
options.c: Yes, because the requirements for all RNP operations are the same.
options.d: No, because your aircraft may not have the requirements for RNP 2.
